title: Reproduction Dossier Workspace
concept: A document-style WordPress Playground workspace for support engineers where each Playground is a case file: source, persistence, saved identity, Site Manager tools, Blueprint catalog, and handoff actions appear as inline document clauses with contextual controls instead of app rails or modal stacks.
focus: visible save, reset, import, and delete consequences
flows: Select a launch route with route-specific inputs for Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or .zip import, then see the resulting preparation state.
Save a temporary Playground either in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination text, file-copy progress, and resulting saved state.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds through a document register with rename, delete, open, and temporary-state consequences.
Use Site Manager document tabs for settings reset or saved reload, file browser editing, Blueprint bundle actions, database tools, and logs.
Browse all 43 Blueprint catalog entries with search, category filters, selected detail, run, and inspect behavior.
Export to GitHub, download as .zip, or import a .zip over the current site with replacement consequences visible.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and saved reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
